about: I’m a Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience, specializing in backend engineering, scalable microservices, and database optimization. Skilled in Node.js, Express.js, Golang, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis, I focus on building secure, high-performance APIs and fault-tolerant systems. I also have hands-on experience in Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and React.js, with a track record of leading teams, mentoring developers, and implementing best practices to deliver reliable, future-ready solutions
